feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 135,191Chapters: 34/?Kudos: 121

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,239Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Following Merlin to the Tavern
entry.summary:
Author: Garnishedcarnist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,523Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: "Eyes on me, Arthur," Merlin chokes out, and Arthur trails his eyes up his body to meet his manservant's."He's a good demonstration, isn't he?" Chimes Gwaine, voice low and hungry. "He's easy to bed as a maiden, Arthur, look," Gwaine's sitting behind Merlin on his bed, hands reaching around to hike up his shirt and tease at his pale chest. He pulls it over Merlin's head, exposing his thin, pale body. It's littered with love bites and bruises.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dreams of Drowning (All I Wanted Was You)
entry.summary:
Author: AA_BATTERY479

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,965Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 28

Summary: ...“You shouldn’t be here…’s not safe.”Merlin doesn’t stop, either not hearing him or ignoring the warning. Probably the latter.He crosses in front of him, and Arthur notices that his shirt is splattered with blood. “You’re bleeding,” Arthur whispers.Merlin continues. “It’s not my blood, don’t worry.”Arthur’s brain tries to make sense of that statement, fails, and promptly moves on.Merlin huffs in satisfaction when the last of the chains are removed. With nothing holding him up, Arthur slumps forward and falls into him, and Merlin lets out a little “oof” as he struggles with the sudden weight.I love you, Arthur thinks, as Merlin grunts and lifts him up, throwing his arm around his shoulder, somehow lifting his full weight. I love you. Merlin's blurry face swims above him, glancing down at Arthur every few seconds in concern, trying to figure out a plan to get out of here with Arthur's depleted strength. I love you. I love you. I love you...

entry.title: My nose turned up.
entry.summary:
Author: CleopatraStars

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,298Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 1

Summary: The only correct way that BBC should have ended Merlin after literally queerbating and teasing us with the promise of someone getting laid for 8 years it's too many seasons for you to have been playing this childish games and have the audacity to turn around and tell me that every structure of failure starting from the last time a monster of the week format was entertaining was Dora and even she had returned antagonists. Listen to me when you start of a character like Merlin and this fucker goes I could take you apart with less than that ideas coming to my head this man literally starts a fight that could have led to his execution that could have led to an international conflict turns around and decides actually I'm okay with your father murdering my people he better be getting laid take it back now you threw away your principles for less than a fucking Pinky kiss don't even so nice jewelry take it back.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Power, Prophecy, and Pendragons
entry.summary:
Author: B_B

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,846Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Be soft. Do not let the world make you hard. Do not let the pain make you hate. Do not let the bitterness steal your sweetness. Take pride that even though the rest of the world may disagree, you still believe it to be a beautiful place. – Kurt VonnegutMerlyn has left Camelot behind to heal. Arthur has remained to change what his father will not. Destiny whispers in the ears of those listening and shouts at those who don't. But there is still the ever-present question - Do we control our own Fates, or are we eternally bound to tread the path already laid before us?Fem!Merlin!!BOOK 3!!

entry.title: Season of the Sticks
entry.summary:
Author: Idontknowguys

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,977Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin's magic makes him dream of Arthur. He's shocked when one of the dreams comes true. (5+1 things) The dreams are weird and obsessive, just like our favorite magic wielder.   AKA: "And I'll dream each night of some version of you that I might not have, but I did not lose."

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,428Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 19

Summary: "You bring nothing but chaos," Merlin said, his voice echoing against the stone walls. "You will never reach that lake." Arthur closed the distance between them, a dangerous smirk playing on his lips. "Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt for anyone?" Merlin didn't flinch. Instead, a wicked, knowing smile brushed his face. "No," he whispered, his breath teasing Arthur's skin. "But if you want to show me..." Beneath his skin, an ancient magic stirred impatiently. Arthur locked his gaze onto him. "Then by all means, try." In that moment, one thing became certain: Someone was going to kneel. — Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin.

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,024Chapters: 14/18Kudos: 458

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: The Paper King
entry.summary:
Author: HerMajestyofLichtenstein

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,472Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 185

Summary: As Camelot stands on the brink of a new reign, the future has never been more uncertain. After the death of Uther, Arthur is poised to take the throne. However, heavy is the head that wears the crown. With the Council’s ultimatum looming large, his own advisors quietly manoeuvre for power in the shadows. Merlin can no longer hide behind the anonymity of a servant. With his magic exposed, he is thrust into the heart of court politics and responsibility. Protecting Arthur is no longer his only duty, and his people need him more than ever. In a realm on the edge of change, can they find balance in their new roles, or will the weight of the crown and the cost of magic tear Camelot apart?

entry.title: No longer you
entry.summary:
Author: Rising_moon012

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,215Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Soulmates can be the earth's best gift to those willing to accept them. Fate chooses the perfect person for you to share your life with, and offers them to you on a silver platter covered with gold leaves and jewels. She tells you exactly how to find them and who they are, and all you have to do is allow yourself to let them share that bond and gift with you: A handprint is left on you from the moment you're born. Only you can see it, showing you exactly where your one true love will touch you for the first time, and when that happens, it disappears. A kind promise of Fate, as most say. The legend prophesies a Kingdom where magic is shunned, but soulmates are sacred. Where a royal heir will become the once and future king with the help and protection of a young warlock meant for greatness and a prince who sees too much. The moment they meet, and the bond is formed, the legend begins. And nothing can, or will ever, change it. If you believe in Fate, that is.   OR Merlin and Arthur share a soulmate: Romeo Aster. (A merlin BBC rewrite with an original character in the middle)

  • Dark Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 900Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. Each one can be read on it's own. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Drabbles
  • some will eventually be mature
  • 100 words each exactly
  • some are AU and some are canon compliant

entry.title: I thought I knew you
entry.summary:
Author: Capricorn00

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,554Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Merlin can no longer stand the weight of his destiny, and the cost that he keeps paying for Arthur's sake. He's tired, and he's done with Camelot. He wants to leave. / I don't own Merlin, this is purely fanfiction and I make no profit from this.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merthur
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_p3ndragon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,084Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 181

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Vibe Check
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,583Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 162

Summary: Arthur is saying things. Strange things. Gwaine thinks it’s the best council meeting he’s ever attended. Merlin is increasingly concerned. Everyone else is doing their best to survive it. I apologise for this in advance. This is the result of being awake for 28 hours straight and having a very questionable idea at some point in the middle of the night. “what if Arthur Pendragon came back from the future and immediately started talking like this.” It is not meant to be taken seriously in any way.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,958Chapters: 3/11Kudos: 5

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin/Morgana (Merlin)

entry.title: Again
entry.summary:
Author: Igni_hendricks

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,052Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 516

Summary: When Merlin kills Morgana, she thinks it’s finally over. But then she wakes up several years in the past, in the heart of Camelot, surrounded by the very people she wants dead.She needs a plan, and she needs answers. Neither of these things turn out to be as simple as they seem, and Morgana begins to wonder if there could have been a different path for her after all.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
